name: bosch-flow-mcp
description: Provides access to Bosch eBike Flow (Smart System / BES3) data including battery health, charge cycle history, component registrations, service records, and live state-of-charge with local SQLite caching and trend analysis. Features OAuth (PKCE) authentication via the one-bike-app public client, incremental synchronization, optional EUDA Data Act API support, and battery degradation tracking over time.
